decisions.reasoning: Incineroar will likely attempt to pivot or use Fake Out; U-turn allows me to deal chip damage while maintaining momentum and bringing in a more favorable matchup to handle the Incineroar.

Tornadus-Therian is at a disadvantage against Incineroar's Flare Blitz and Intimidate. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to neutralize the opponent's Incineroar with Intimidate and pivot safely.
Calyrex-Ice is at 44% HP and will be outsped and KO'd by Flare Blitz next turn. Switching to Tornadus-Therian provides a safe pivot to preserve Calyrex-Ice for later while avoiding the KO.

Tornadus-Therian is at 48% HP and will be KO'd by Flare Blitz next turn, while Hurricane only 3HKOs. Switching to Incineroar provides an Intimidate drop and a resistance to the predicted Flare Blitz, preserving Tornadus for a potential Regenerator recovery later.
Calyrex-Ice has fainted, so I must send out a new Pokemon. Tornadus-Therian is the safest pivot to handle Incineroar's Fire/Dark coverage while maintaining momentum with Regenerator.

Tornadus-Therian is threatened by a 2HKO from Flare Blitz and cannot secure a KO on Incineroar. Switching to my own Incineroar allows me to utilize Intimidate to mitigate incoming damage and pivot safely.

Flutter Mane is at 6% HP and will be OHKOed by Flare Blitz or 2HKOed by Knock Off, so it cannot stay in. Switching to Tornadus-Therian preserves the Flutter Mane for a potential late-game priority move or chip damage while bringing in a healthy pivot.
Incineroar is at 30% HP, putting it well within range of Hurricane (45.3-53.5%). Since I outspeed, I can secure the KO this turn before Incineroar can use Flare Blitz to finish me off.
I outspeed Urshifu-Rapid-Strike and Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO, making it the optimal play to remove the threat immediately.

Tornadus-Therian has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Incineroar is the best choice to pivot into Urshifu-Rapid-Strike to utilize Intimidate and potentially force a switch or chip the opponent.
Flutter Mane is at 6% HP and will be knocked out by any move, so I must use my priority/speed advantage to secure the KO on Urshifu before fainting.
